scrollText: Hi, I'm Ayush, a first year CS student at the University of Waterloo. I love F1, playing drums and solving problems. I travel to a new country every year, and I'm always chasing whatever excites me next. Let's connect.
funFact: I can name every country on a blank map.
quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
currently: Incoming Software Engineer at Strada (YC S23)

experience.description: Describe what you worked on and the impact you made.

projects.name: CXR: AI Chest X-Ray Assistant
projects.description: Trained a ResNet50 chest X-ray classifier on ~20k images achieving ~80% F1 optimized for ~90% recall. Built a full-stack clinical triage app with a Next.js physician UI and FastAPI inference endpoints, with deterministic logic and schema-constrained outputs.

projects.name: Unmute: Spotify Analytics Platform
projects.description: Full-stack Spotify analytics dashboard extending Wrapped with custom time-range recaps, audio-feature profiling, and trend visualizations. Implemented OAuth 2.0 with token rotation and batched requests across 5+ Spotify endpoints with retry/backoff logic.

projects.name: ClipCraft: Automated Video Clipper
projects.description: Automated video clipping pipeline using scene-change detection to extract clips from long-form footage. FFmpeg-based workflow for trimming, concatenation, and encoding with configurable presets for clip length and export quality.

projects.name: Personal Website: ayushpatra.com
projects.description: Designed and built a fully custom portfolio with shader-based Aurora backgrounds, a typewriter landing page, scroll-reveal text animations, and a Spotify-integrated music page. Features an interactive travel map, photo gallery, and bento-grid about section, all statically exported for fast load times.
